message:
feat(fcp-crypto): add comprehensive benchmarks for crypto primitives

Add benchmarks for all crypto primitives used in FCP2 hot paths:
- Ed25519 sign/verify/keygen
- X25519 keygen and Diffie-Hellman
- BLAKE3 keyed MAC (32B, 1KB, 64KB) with throughput metrics
- ChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD encrypt/decrypt with throughput
- HPKE seal/open for zone key distribution
- COSE capability token sign/verify

These benchmarks support performance tracking for admission control,
session establishment, and capability verification paths.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -63,3 +63,8 @@ serde_json.workspace = true
 rand_chacha = "0.3"
 proptest.workspace = true
 tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+criterion.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "crypto_benchmarks"
+harness = false
